actix.description: Actix-web 4 with rustls for HTTP/2 support, compiled with -O3 and thin LTO.

aspnet-grpc.description: ASP.NET Core gRPC server using .NET 10 preview with Kestrel.

aspnet-minimal.description: Minimal ASP.NET Core server using .NET 10 preview with Kestrel and minimal API routing.

aspnet-mvc.description: Minimal ASP.NET Core server using .NET 10 preview with Kestrel and MVC routing.

aspnet-websocket.description: ASP.NET Core WebSocket echo server using .NET 10 preview with Kestrel and minimal API.

blitz.description: Custom Zig HTTP server with dual epoll/io_uring backends. Zero-copy parsing, pre-computed responses, pipeline batching.

bun.description: Bun's built-in HTTP server using JavaScriptCore engine with multi-core clustering.

caddy.description: Caddy web server with a custom handler module for benchmark endpoints, native HTTP/2 support.

Carno.js.description: Ultra-fast, performance-first framework for Bun with JIT-compiled routes, decorator-based API, and built-in DI.

chi.description: Chi is a lightweight, idiomatic and composable router for building Go HTTP services, built on top of net/http.

deno.description: Deno HTTP server using deno serve --parallel with zero-dependency native fetch handler.

Django.description: Django web framework on Gunicorn with sync workers, one worker per CPU core.

drogon.description: Drogon C++ framework using HttpController with async callbacks, mimalloc allocator, and -flto optimization.

echo.description: Echo is a high performance, extensible, minimalist Go web framework with optimized HTTP router, middleware support, and data binding.

Elysia.description: Ergonomic TypeScript framework built for Bun with end-to-end type safety and excellent DX.

Express.description: Fast, unopinionated, minimalist web framework for Node.js. The most widely used backend framework in the JavaScript ecosystem.

FastAPI.description: FastAPI async web framework on Uvicorn (uvloop), multi-worker via gunicorn.

Fastify.description: Fast and low-overhead Node.js web framework built for developer experience and performance.

FastPySGI-ASGI.description: An ultra fast WSGI/ASGI server for Python

FastPySGI-WSGI.description: An ultra fast WSGI/ASGI server for Python

fiber.description: Fiber is an Express-inspired Go web framework built on fasthttp, featuring zero-allocation routing and extreme performance.

flask.description: Flask web framework on Gunicorn with sync workers, one worker per CPU core.

Fletch.description: Express-inspired HTTP framework for Dart with radix-tree routing, middleware chains, signed sessions, and built-in DI.

GenHTTP.description: Lightweight, embeddable and modular C# web server.

GenHTTP-WS.description: GenHTTP WebSocket echo server using the functional API with zero-allocation frame handling.

gin.description: Gin is a Go web framework with a martini-like API, featuring the fastest HTTP router (httprouter) and zero-allocation routing.

gleam-mist.description: Mist HTTP server for Gleam on the BEAM VM — first Gleam and first BEAM entry in HttpArena.

go-fasthttp.description: High-performance Go HTTP server using fasthttp with zero-allocation design and buffer reuse.

go-websocket.description: Go WebSocket echo server using gobwas/ws

h2o.description: High-performance C HTTP server using libh2o with multi-threaded event loops and native HTTP/2 support.

h2o-mruby.description: h2o config-based server with mruby handlers and native HTTP/3 (QUIC) support.

helidon.description: Helidon SE 4.4 on Níma WebServer with Java 21 virtual threads, Jackson for JSON.

hono (node).description: Ultrafast web framework built on Web Standards, runs on any JS runtime.

Hono (Bun).description: Ultrafast Web Standards framework running natively on Bun — no adapter overhead.

hummingbird.description: Lightweight, flexible HTTP server framework written in Swift, built on SwiftNIO with minimal dependencies.

hyper.description: Low-level HTTP library for Rust, built on tokio with multi-threaded async runtime.

kemal.description: Kemal web framework for Crystal, compiled with --release optimizations.

Koa.description: Expressive middleware framework for Node.js by the Express team, using async/await.

ktor.description: JetBrains Ktor 3.x on Netty with Kotlin coroutines, kotlinx.serialization, JDK 21.

lithium.description: Lithium C++ HTTP framework with compile-time reflection, boost::context coroutines, and -O3 -march=native -flto.

may-minihttp.description: Mini HTTP server built on May stackful coroutines. Uses cooperative scheduling with coroutine-per-connection model for high concurrency.

nginx.description: Nginx with a custom C handler module, compiled with -O3 -march=native.

nginx-openresty.description: OpenResty (Nginx + LuaJIT) with Lua content handlers for all benchmark endpoints.

ngx-php.description: Embedded PHP scripting language module for nginx.

node.description: Bare Node.js HTTP server using the cluster module for multi-core scaling.

node-websocket.description: Node.js WebSocket echo server using ws package

ntex-iouring.description: ntex web framework with neon-uring runtime (io_uring), compiled with -O3 and thin LTO.

ntex-tokio.description: ntex web framework with Tokio runtime, compiled with -O3 and thin LTO.

phoenix.description: Phoenix 1.7 on Cowboy — the most popular Elixir web framework. First Elixir entry in HttpArena.

prologue.description: Prologue web framework for Nim — compiles to native C with powerful routing and middleware support.

quarkus-jvm.description: Quarkus with RESTEasy Reactive on Vert.x/Netty, JDK 21, optimized JVM tuning.

quarkus-jvm-grpc.description: Quarkus gRPC server using quarkus-grpc on Vert.x with h2c, JDK 21, optimized JVM tuning.

Rage.description: Rage is a modern Ruby framework designed for non-blocking I/O and simpler infrastructure

Rails.description: Ruby on Rails (API mode) on Puma, multi-worker with one worker per CPU core.

ringzero.description: Custom C HTTP server built on io_uring with a multi-reactor architecture. No epoll, no thread-per-connection.

rocket.description: Rocket 0.5 on Tokio with Rustls for HTTP/2, compiled with -O3 and thin LTO.

rust-epoll.description: Zero-dependency Rust HTTP engine using raw epoll syscalls, one-thread-per-core with SO_REUSEPORT.

salvo.description: Salvo web framework with Quinn HTTP/3 support on Tokio runtime, compiled with -O3 and thin LTO.

Scotty.description: Scotty web framework on Warp, a lightweight Haskell framework inspired by Ruby's Sinatra.

Sinatra.description: Sinatra DSL web framework on Puma, multi-threaded with one worker per CPU core.

spring-jvm.description: Spring Boot with embedded Tomcat on JDK 21 (HotSpot JVM with ZGC).

spring-jvm-grpc.description: Spring Boot gRPC server using grpc-spring-boot-starter with Netty transport on JDK 24.

Starlette.description: Starlette ASGI framework on Uvicorn (uvloop), multi-worker via gunicorn. The foundation FastAPI is built on.

tonic-grpc.description: Rust gRPC server using tonic, a native Rust gRPC implementation built on top of hyper and tower.

ulfius.description: Ulfius C REST framework built on GNU Libmicrohttpd with Jansson JSON. Lightweight with small memory footprint, designed for embedded systems.

ultimate-express.description: ultimate-express (Express API on uWebSockets.js) with single-process threading.

uWebSockets.js.description: Native C++ HTTP/WebSocket server exposed as a Node.js addon. Uses µSockets event loop with epoll, bypassing Node's HTTP stack entirely.

vertx.description: Eclipse Vert.x 4.5 — reactive toolkit on Netty with event-loop threading, JDK 21.

workerman.description: Workerman with PHP content handlers for all benchmark endpoints.
